policy: Public release builds require VERIFY_STORE_POLICY=1 and an approved store policy record.

appListing.subtitle: Quiet intelligence, close at hand.
appListing.fullDescription: Solin is a privacy-first phone-side AI assistant for Android: it is locally usable with downloaded or imported models, verified local vision-capable chat models can process user-provided images on device, and user-configured remote multimodal models are used only after configuration and switching. Ordinary remote text follows the selected reminder policy; images and suspected sensitive content require per-send confirmation. Device actions are conservative by default: low-risk app search can continue under the user's setting, while sending, deleting, paying, ordering, publishing, sensitive input, and permission changes still require confirmation. Chats, explicit memories, model files, and tool audit records stay in local app storage by default.

zh-CN.subtitle: 让 AI 住在手机里
zh-CN.shortDescription: 让 AI 住在手机里
zh-CN.fullDescription: Solin是一款隐私优先的手机端 AI 助手：可使用下载或导入的本地模型，也可在用户配置并切换后使用远程多模态模型。普通远程文本按提醒策略处理，图片和疑似敏感内容需要逐次确认。设备动作默认保守：低风险 App 搜索可按设置连续执行，发送、删除、支付、下单、发布、敏感输入和权限变更仍必须确认。聊天、显式记忆、模型文件和工具审计记录默认保存在本地应用存储中。

en-US.subtitle: Quiet intelligence, close at hand.
en-US.fullDescription: Solin is a privacy-first phone-side AI assistant for Android: local when you want it, remote only when you configure and choose it, and careful about device actions that need confirmation.

externalRecipients: Recommended and custom model download hosts
Android system or destination apps opened by confirmed external intents

permissions.name: android.permission.INTERNET
permissions.purpose: Connects for user-configured remote model calls and optional model downloads.

permissions.name: android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO
permissions.purpose: Lets the user dictate text through explicit voice input before sending.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_CALENDAR
permissions.purpose: Reads busy/free calendar windows only after user-confirmed tool requests.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_CONTACTS
permissions.purpose: Looks up contact names or phone matches only after user-confirmed tool requests.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
permissions.purpose: Supports legacy Android 12 and below media or file metadata reads after confirmation.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_MEDIA_IMAGES
permissions.purpose: Reads selected recent images or screenshots for metadata and OCR flows after confirmation.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VIDEO
permissions.purpose: Supports user-provided video attachments and recent media metadata checks after confirmation.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VISUAL_USER_SELECTED
permissions.purpose: Honors Android selected visual media grants for user-chosen image inputs.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_MEDIA_AUDIO
permissions.purpose: Handles user-provided audio attachments as metadata-only inputs without automatic upload.

permissions.name: android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS
permissions.purpose: Posts reminder notifications only for user-created or confirmed background tasks.

permissions.name: com.android.alarm.permission.SET_ALARM
permissions.purpose: Lets confirmed alarm and timer actions open Android's system alarm flow when requested by the user.

permissions.name: android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE
permissions.purpose: Runs a short-lived foreground device-control session while executing user-confirmed Accessibility actions.

permissions.name: android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_SPECIAL_USE
permissions.purpose: Declares the special-use foreground service type for user-confirmed device-control sessions.

permissions.name: android.permission.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED
permissions.purpose: Restores scheduled reminder alarms after device reboot or app replacement.

permissions.name: android.permission.PACKAGE_USAGE_STATS
permissions.purpose: Estimates the foreground app for confirmed device-context tools when Usage Access is granted.

specialAccessDisclosures.name: UsageAccess
specialAccessDisclosures.purpose: Used only after confirmation to estimate the current foreground app.

specialAccessDisclosures.name: AccessibilityService
specialAccessDisclosures.purpose: Used after confirmation for current-screen text reads and during user-initiated low-risk phone-control sessions for tap, type, search, scroll, back, and wait gestures.

specialAccessDisclosures.name: MediaProjection
specialAccessDisclosures.purpose: Used only after foreground consent for one-shot current screenshot OCR.
